pages.text: Time Period: Mid Devonian-Late Carboniferous Period $(br2)Temperament: Passive $(br2)Diet: Herbivorous $(br2)Preferred Habitats: Deep Lukewarm Oceans, Beaches

The Hibbertopterus is a strange scorpion which doesn't do very much thinking. They feed by filtering substrate (dirt) through their front appendages, combing for tasty invertebrates. A Hibbertopterus' feeding habits make it very good at plowing and tilling. They can be ridden and controlled with a block of dirt on a stick in order to till soil underneath them and prime it for farming.
